creator: rm@FreeBSD.org
text:
- update to 1.1.0
- trim Makefile header
- add CHEESESHOP and make it primary MASTER_SITE, because other locations doesn't hold the new relase yet
- add LICENSE (BSD)
- replace USE_XZ with USE_ZIP, since it was changed upstream
- tune PYDISTUTILS_PKGNAME
- move python32 plist stuff into separate file
